text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I decide to drop by a cafe to quench<n>my thirst. The
cafe is packed, but I<n>finally make it to the front of
the line<n>to enter...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Ding-a-ling! ♪ Welcome! ☆ Thank you<n>for waiting!
Table for one?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! This place is super cute and<n>fancy! I'm
gonna stick out like a sore<n>thumb!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Really? You appear to be fitting in<n>perfectly well to
me.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry, but we don't have<n>any empty
tables at the moment...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would you mind sharing your<n>table with
these two patrons?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're a trainer from the<n>academy! Are you
sure? We'd really<n>appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well then, allow us to accept your<n>kindness and
join you.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! ☆ I'll show<n>you to your
table! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We sit at our table and look through<n>the menu. As
we're about to order...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Um... For my drink, I'll have a, uh...<n>Royal... Mari...
Maririn? Please.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! ♪ One Royal ☆ Maririn!<n>Would you like an
Angel Ring to go<n>with that? It's on our seasonal
dessert menu!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, uh, yeah... One of those too.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! ♪ Oh! You have a choice<n>of three sizes
for your drink—Dolly,<n>Pretty, or Charming! Which
would you<n>like? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: P-pretty? Charming? Um, uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pardon us... This is our first time here.<n>Might I
trouble you to explain the<n>sizes?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Certainly! ☆ "Dolly" is a small, "Pretty"<n>is a
medium, and...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After listening to the staff go through<n>the unique
size names, we somehow<n>manage to order three
drinks and a<n>dessert.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Half of what she said was<n>gibberish to
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phewww. I can finally relax. I was on<n>edge that
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Your composure really saved my<n>glutes, Ardan.
Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I should be the one thanking<n>you for the
invitation. You've given<n>me the opportunity to
experience this<n>whimsical cafe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we've been meeting regularly at<n>Mejiro
family gatherings ever since<n>we were young. Ryan
has always<n>been so kindhearted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
She would always teach me new<n>games or show
me secret spots. I<n>have many fun and fond
memories<n>with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I almost forgot about that!<n>You're older
than me, so I loved how<n>you'd always listen to
what I had to<n>say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I still really appreciate that<n>about you, even
now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, but of course. I'll gladly lend<n>you an ear
whenever you may need<n>it.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Ding-a-ling! ♪ Thank you for waiting!<n>Here are
your Royal ☆ Maririns aaand<n>your Angel Ring!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So this is a Royal Maririn... It's black<n>tea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And this Angel Ring... appears to be a<n>very large
Baumkuchen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's as big as a whole cake! Looks<n>like a lot to
eat...
choice_data_list: You two can finish it if you share it!
You two can finish it if you share it!
How about getting it to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's as big as a whole cake! Looks<n>like a lot to
eat...
choice_data_list: You two can finish it if you share it!
You two can finish it if you share it!
How about getting it to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Let's cut it and have half<n>each, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan makes a silent, elegant<n>cut through
the Baumkuchen.<n>Unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh dear, I seem to have split it<n>unevenly. You can
have the large<n>portion, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, you cut it for me, so you should<n>eat the bigger
piece!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you needn't be shy. Besides,<n>I'd like to be
the mature and<n>responsible Umamusume today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know. Perhaps I should cut it<n>into smaller
pieces to make it easier<n>to eat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um, thanks! Ack, I dunno why, but<n>my face is
burning up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They happily split the Baumkuchen<n>and finish the
whole thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's try some of this tea! It<n>looks really
tasty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... The fragrance is so pure.<n>These must be
single-estate tea<n>leaves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You can tell that from the smell? You<n>and Dober
know so much when it<n>comes to tea... Talk about
well-educated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Our knowledge comes from our love<n>of it. You
have much more knowledge<n>than I do when it
comes to muscles,<n>don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's true... Oh! I know this one<n>muscle workout
you can do right now,<n>while you're sitting down!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's called a "seated calf raise." You<n>focus on
putting weight on your<n>soleus muscle and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My goodness... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy a spirited chat about<n>various topics as
we sip and savor<n>our tea.
